name: docx_read
description: Read the Markdown projection of a paragraph window, a range, or a whole story (body, footnotes, comments, headers, footers). Use docx_outline or docx_search first to get an anchor; long ranges paginate with a continuation token under the token cap.

anchor.description: Paragraph anchor like 'P12#e7f8'. Reads this paragraph plus the surrounding window.

range.description: Paragraph range like 'P10..P24'. Alternative to anchor.

window.description: Paragraphs of surrounding context to include around the anchor.

content.description: Markdown projection with anchors and salient formatting; resolved run-level formatting when response_format is 'detailed'.

continuation.description: Continuation token, present when the range was paginated.
